## Recap:

Reached and explored Variel’s creator’s (Vae) lab.
We are currently in Zirgisse

## Agenda:

## Log:

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Tournament in: 5 days

We come in through the Underwell Gate.

Shopping Time!!!

A lot of shops, specializing in various types of magecraft and arcane arts and other specialty stores.

We buy magic beans

- Go somewhere with a lot of space
- Plant it, and water it

Look for Mad Hatter’s Broomstick (somewhere south of Honeyside)

- A sign of a giant hat with a rabbit riding a broomstick flying out of the hat

Avery goes to sign up for the competition

Hear the crowd quieten down. Sees a large carriage pulled up beside the academy. Door opens, a few people in robes step out and stand guard outside the carriage door. A figure wearing maroon robes with blue highlights and step out

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Walks up to the regn booth.

Prison is around Stone Road.

Gambling Pool:

Falinzia Everfaire (13)

Theldefine Greystone (13)

Rhycharde (11 votes)

Ask the bartender whotf the other two people are. Falinza and Theldefine are adventurers.

Theldefine is a ten year professor at the Arcane Academy of Zirgisse - vet prof who retired years ago. Is a dwarf.

Falinzia is an adventurer who came in from Kingdom of Arcana, Silver adventurer -  maybe Gold now, popular due to fact that she travels with two others, elf

Would prefer that the competition

Quest: Investigate some disappearances, and eliminate the cause, and provide proof and a full account of what happened

- Students and cityfolk would go out into the forest to gather herbs and spices, etc
- Those who go out alone would be found intoxicated (if they are found)
- There are 4 missing people, (2 students, 2 cityfolk)
